description: Official receipt of some kind. In Arabic script. Dated: 556 AH (or kharājī?); if AH, this would correspond to 1160/61 CE. For Bū l-Ḥasan b. Bū l-Qāsim(?). The sum recorded, twice in words and once in Greek/Coptic numerals, is 2/3 dinar. Names the judge Abū Muḥammad ʿAbd al-Wahhāb b. ʿAbd al-Malik b. Ismāʿīl, and it also involves Maḥfūẓ al-Ṣabbāgh (or al-Ṣāyigh?). The text on verso may be a filing note, but it mentions [...] b. Lāwī who is not named in the main document. (Information from receipt team: LB, SL, MR, NV.)
description_he: קבלה רשמית מסוג כלשהו. בכתב ערבי. תאריך: 556 להג'רה, 1160/61 לספירה. עבור בו אל-חסן בן בו אל-קאסם. הסכום הוא 2/3 דינר. מוזכרים השופט אבו מוחמד עבד אל-והאב ומחפוז' אל-צבאע'.
